title: Small Caps Font
description: A simple texture pack that take the Minecraft Five font into the game.
body:
This simple texture pack replaces Minecraft’s default font with the Minecraft Five font, giving your game a clean, modern look. The Minecraft Five font is widely used across many modded servers and community projects, making your in-game text feel familiar and polished while keeping the overall vanilla style intact.

This pack is also inspired by [qrafty's capitalized font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font)

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e7a22b3dbabaa1f777c0241b72f1f031c03e23.png)
